objective: Open the QQ音乐 search UI, focus the search field, submit a query, and capture post-submit evidence.

query.note: ASCII remains the simplest baseline, but clipboard-backed search entry has also been validated with the Chinese query 周杰伦.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
The recipe may foreground QQ音乐 and will use the clipboard temporarily before restoring it.

notes: The current path foregrounds QQ音乐, focuses the search field, and temporarily uses the clipboard.
This recipe proves query submission only; it does not prove stable result selection or playback activation.

steps.purpose: Bring QQ音乐 to the foreground before sending the search shortcut.
Reveal and focus the QQ音乐 search surface through the known shortcut plus AX click.
Paste the query through the clipboard, then submit it and restore the prior clipboard snapshot.
Capture post-submit evidence for inspect and later distillation.

expected_signals: debug.pressKey succeeds for the known search shortcut.
success_criteria: The query is submitted without using pointer primitives.
The clipboard is restored after submission.
non_goals: This recipe does not prove result selection.
This recipe does not prove playback activation.

known_limits.foreground_shift: The current implementation foregrounds QQ音乐 before sending the reveal shortcut and paste action.
known_limits.clipboard_usage: The recipe temporarily replaces the clipboard and then restores it.
known_limits.surface_readiness: The recipe now focuses the search field explicitly instead of assuming a shortcut alone establishes the active input.
known_limits.result_selection: Stable result-row selection still requires OCR/pointer fallback in the current validated baseline.
known_limits.shared_app_state: This recipe should not run concurrently with other QQ音乐 recipes against the same live app instance.
